scripts.install: pnpm run install-server && pnpm run install-client
scripts.watch: pnpm run server & pnpm run client
scripts.test: pnpm --prefix server run test && pnpm --prefix client run test:ci
scripts.deploy: npm run build --prefix client && npm start --prefix server
scripts.deploy-cluster: pnpm --prefix client run build && pnpm --prefix server run cluster
